burden.dalyPerCapita: high in severe disease; significant heart failure burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography with valve area/gradient assessment; symptomatic triad of dyspnea, angina, syncope

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low; limited access to valve replacement

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echocardiography mainly in urban or tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Surgical valve replacement; TAVR available in select centers
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing network of cardiac surgery centers
